name: Umbrage
description: A pistol variant fitted with a Vladof barrel, trading cleaner handling for a much faster fire rate and a larger magazine. Its shots also carry a large splash component, giving it more explosive punch than the weapon's straightforward appearance suggests. The loss in accuracy is noticeable, but the added splash makes it much more dangerous at close range.
notes: Its splash damage is equal to 80% of the shot's weapon damage and is increased by grenade-damage bonuses. Random world drop from suitable loot sources.
